name: codebase-intelligence
description: Standalone PRP workflow (prp-plan / prp-implement / prp-loop) with Serena LSP structural codebase search, cross-session task memory keyed by Jira ticket + branch, live Jira ticket context injection, a personal KB (bookrag), prp-loop (a bounded closed-loop runner with contract-mandated stop rules and an independent verifier), and prp-orchestrate: a mediator-judged parallel agent-team layer (7 generic role specialists in isolated git worktrees, per-round .claude/-rules verdicts, serial merge gate). Self-contained — no prp-core required.
